relativeTime.minutesAgo: {n, plural, one {1 minute ago} other {# minutes ago}}
relativeTime.hoursAgo: {n, plural, one {1 hour ago} other {# hours ago}}
relativeTime.daysAgo: {n, plural, one {1 day ago} other {# days ago}}

notificationsSheet.title: Notifications
notificationsSheet.ariaDescription: List of unread and recent notifications

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Price alerts, trust signals, new followers. Coming soon.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Your profile, your watchlists, your followers. Coming soon.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile, account, security and privacy.

email.sectionDescription: Your email is used to sign in and to receive security notifications.
email.sameAsCurrent: The new email is the same as your current one.
email.checkFailed: Couldn't verify the email right now
email.helpText: For security we ask you to confirm your current password. You'll get a verification code at the new address. Max 1 request per day.
email.pendingDescription: We sent you a 6-digit code. Enter it here to complete the change. The code expires after 15 minutes.

password.oauthInfo: You signed in with Google. Password management happens directly in your Google account.
password.sectionDescription: Confirm your current password and choose a new one.

profile.headline: Headline
profile.headlineHelp: Short tagline shown next to your name. Maximum {max} characters.
profile.bioHelp: Extended description for your profile page. Maximum {max} characters.
profile.emailMoveInfo: Email change is available from the Account section.
profile.languageHelp: Sets the language of the admin panel and emails. Applies on save.

avatar.label: Profile photo
avatar.description: PNG, JPG or WebP. You can crop and zoom before saving.

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
mfa.descriptionInactive: Adds a second step to sign-in: besides your password we ask for a code from an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy…). Even if someone stole your password, they couldn't sign in without your phone.
mfa.inactiveNotice: You haven't enabled two-factor authentication yet.
mfa.descriptionActive: At sign-in we ask for a code from your authenticator app along with your password.
mfa.setupDescription: Adds a second step to sign-in: besides your password we ask for a code from an authenticator app. We suggest Google Authenticator, 1Password or Authy.
mfa.stepScanDescription: Open your authenticator app and add a new account by scanning this code.
mfa.manualKey: Enter this key into the app manually:
mfa.stepCodeDescription: Open the app and type the 6-digit code you see now to confirm setup.
mfa.recoveryDescription: They let you sign in if you lose your phone. Each code can be used once. Save them somewhere safe: after this screen we can't show them again.
mfa.confirmSaved: I've saved the recovery codes somewhere safe.
mfa.disableDescription: For security we ask you to confirm with your password and the current code from your authenticator app. All recovery codes will be invalidated.
mfa.regenerateDescription: Confirm with a current code from your authenticator app. The 10 previous codes will be invalidated and we'll generate 10 new ones.

sessions.title: Active sessions
sessions.description: Active sign-ins to your account right now. Revoking a session signs out that device immediately. The session you're using now can't be revoked from here — use sign out.
sessions.revokeAllConfirm: You're about to close {n} session(s). On those devices sign-in will be required again.

devices.title: Trusted devices
devices.description: From these devices you can sign in without receiving an email verification code. This is different from sessions above: revoking a device doesn't close any active session, but at the next sign-in from there we'll ask for the OTP code again.
devices.revokeAllConfirm: You're about to revoke {n} device(s). At the next sign-in from those devices a new verification code will be required.

consents.sectionDescription: Here are the agreements you've accepted. Terms and Privacy Policy are required to use the platform; marketing consent is optional and you can change it anytime.
consents.marketingNotGiven: You haven't consented to marketing communications.

cookies.title: Cookie preferences
cookies.description: Manage which cookie categories you've accepted. Necessary cookies are always on: without them the site wouldn't work.
cookies.bannerDisabledInfo: The administrator disabled the cookie banner: all non-essential cookies are off.
cookies.neverChosen: You haven't chosen yet. The banner will ask at the next public visit.

categories.necessaryDescription: Essential for the site to work (session, security, basic preferences).
categories.preferencesDescription: Store your choices (language, theme, views) to personalize the experience.
categories.statisticsDescription: Help us understand how the site is used through aggregated, anonymous data.
categories.marketingDescription: Allow showing more relevant content and ads on this site or third-party platforms.

export.title: Data export
export.description: Request a JSON archive with all personal data linked to your account. You'll receive an email with the download link (valid 24 hours); you can regenerate the link from settings while the file is available (7 days). Max 1 request per week.
export.requestDescription: Processing takes a few minutes. We'll email you when the archive is ready.

dangerZone.title: Account deletion
dangerZone.description: When you delete your account you start a deletion request: your data is inaccessible for {graceDays} days and then permanently deleted. To cancel the request within that period you'll need to contact support.
dangerZone.passwordStepDescription: Enter your password to confirm. Your session will end and you won't be able to sign in; within {graceDays} days you can cancel the request by contacting support.
dangerZone.noPasswordInfo: Your account doesn't have a local password. To confirm deletion we'll send a verification code to your account email.
dangerZone.codeStepDescription: Enter the 6-digit code received via email. Your session will end and you won't be able to sign in; within {graceDays} days you can cancel the request by contacting support.
dangerZone.confirmCheckbox: I understand that after {graceDays} days my data will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered.

actions.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
actions.devicesRevoked: {n, plural, one {1 device revoked.} other {# devices revoked.}}
actions.cannotRevokeCurrentSession: You can't revoke the current session. To sign out, use the sign out action.
actions.sessionsRevoked: {n, plural, one {1 session revoked.} other {# sessions revoked.}}
actions.mfaAlreadyActive: MFA is already active. Disable it before running setup again.
actions.mfaScanQr: Scan the QR with your authenticator app.
actions.mfaNoPendingSetup: No setup in progress. Start over.
actions.mfaNotActive: MFA is not active on this account.
actions.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Try again in a few minutes.
actions.emailCodeSent: We sent a verification code to {newEmail}.
actions.emailUpdated: Email updated: your email is now {newEmail}.
actions.emailUpdatedRevoked: {count, plural, =0 {} one { 1 other active session was signed out.} other { # other active sessions were signed out.}}
actions.passwordUpdated: Password updated.{count, plural, =0 {} one { 1 other active session was signed out.} other { # other active sessions were signed out.}}
actions.usernameTaken: This username is already in use. Choose another one.
actions.usernameJustTaken: Someone just picked this username. Choose another one.

errors.noPasswordOAuth: Your account has no password (sign in via Google only).
errors.sameAsCurrent: The new password must differ from the current one.
errors.weakPassword: The new password doesn't meet the security requirements.

errors.noPasswordOAuth: Your account has no password (sign in via Google only). Change your email directly from your Google account.
errors.pendingExists: You already have a pending email change request. Confirm the code or cancel it before requesting another one.
errors.rateLimited: You already requested an email change in the last 24 hours. Try again tomorrow.
errors.sameAsCurrent: The new email is the same as the current one.
errors.emailUnavailable: This email is already linked to another account.
errors.emailJustTaken: This email is already in use.
errors.noPending: No pending email change. Request one before confirming.
errors.emailJustRegistered: This email was just registered by another user.
